overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing the protagonist walking through a misty rocky mountain ravine. The character steadily traverses a wet dirt path between steep rock walls with power lines overhead, gradually ascending toward an open valley viewpoint.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain ravine with steep cliff walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow ravine carrying a large cargo pack, navigating the wet uneven terrain

entered.detail: steep dark rock wall forming the left boundary of the ravine
steep rock wall with patches of moss and vegetation on the right side
wet dirt trail with puddles winding through the rocky terrain
tall wooden utility pole with crossbars visible ahead on the path
shallow pools of water reflecting the grey sky on the trail surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow mountain ravine with steep rock walls closing in on both sides. The protagonist walks forward along a wet, muddy path scattered with puddles, heading toward a distant power line pole visible through the misty atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountainside path opening to valley overlook

events.description: rocky cliff on right recedes revealing expansive forested valley view

agents.ego_description: continuing uphill as the path opens to the right, revealing the valley below

entered.detail: expansive view of the forested valley opening up beyond the receding cliff
clusters of grass and low shrubs on the sloping terrain to the right

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the right cliff wall falls away to reveal a sweeping view of the forested valley below. The path continues ascending with vegetation becoming more prominent on the open hillside, while the power line pole draws closer ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain ridge approach with panoramic vista

events.description: path incline increases as character approaches the ridge crest

agents.ego_description: climbing the steeper final section of the path toward the ridge line with the valley fully visible

entered.detail: layered mountain silhouettes visible through the haze on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the ridge crest with a panoramic view of the distant mountain range emerging through the mist. The power line pole now looms close ahead, while the left cliff wall recedes slightly and the expansive valley stretches out to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic mountain ravine that gradually opens into an expansive highland vista. It begins with the protagonist walking along a wet, muddy path flanked by steep rock walls that close in from both sides under a misty atmosphere. As the character progresses, the right cliff wall falls away to reveal a sweeping view of a forested valley below, while the path ascends through increasingly prominent hillside vegetation. The scene then expands toward the ridge crest as the left wall recedes, allowing a panoramic view of a distant mountain range to emerge through the haze. Finally, the camera approaches a looming power line pole as the vast valley stretches out fully to the right.
